scripts.lint: pnpm lint:js && pnpm lint:styles && pnpm lint:md && pnpm lint:tokens && pnpm check:format
scripts.test:storybook: pnpm --filter @pathable/styles build && bash scripts/test-storybook.sh apps/storybook 6006 && bash scripts/test-storybook.sh apps/storybook-react 6007
scripts.test:visual: pnpm --filter @pathable/styles build && pnpm --filter @pathable/storybook build-storybook && node packages/styles/scripts/test-visual.mjs
scripts.quality-gates: pnpm --filter @pathable/styles build && pnpm --filter @pathable/storybook build-storybook && node packages/styles/scripts/quality-gates.mjs
